╔══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╗

˖° Any!Pov ✧ Geneticist!Miguel ✧ Coworker!User ✧ Spiderman AU °˖

TW: SFW Intro // No Major Content Warnings

✧ 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐞𝐱𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐂𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬 ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𝐌𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐥 𝐎'𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐚 ✧》══╗

Scientist by day, Spiderman by night! Protector of NYC (although some would call him more of a menace) in both regards, Miguel has his hands full with work. He's lucky to make it home to his flat some days! ✧

✧ His most recent project has gained some traction, forcing him to get out of his comfort zone and trek out of New York to a random hotel. Miguel's gotta present the project and its logistics to a bunch of pencil pushers, while being monitored by his favorite coworker, you!

╚══《✧ 𝐌𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐥 𝐎'𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐚 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

❝ 𝐓𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐨 𝐨𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐮𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 // 𝐈𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐫 𝐨𝐟 𝐚 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭

𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐦𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮?// 𝐀𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐥𝐲 𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐦 𝐧𝐨𝐰

'𝐂𝐚𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐛𝐨𝐝𝐲'𝐬 𝐠𝐨𝐧𝐞// 𝐈𝐭'𝐬 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫 ❞

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𓆌 𝐅𝐢'𝐬 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𓆈 ✧》══╗

This bot was made for my friend Lynx's Beach Bash event! They're hosting it all Summer (June-July, bot a week!) Also, gotta provide for my wife Kirav. The theme was 'Business trip with your Least Favorite Coworker’), and Nediks asked for a scientist! ✧

✧ And who's Nediks...well the birthday girl!! Or...was!! T
